tasks.subject: FR-T1: httpStatusPolicy failure primitives + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add pure failure-classification + recovery primitives to httpStatusPolicy.ts (FailureClass, PERMANENT_ERROR_MARKERS, INFRA_ERROR_MARKERS, classifyFailure, isRecoverableFailureClass, selectReclaimableIds, resolveRecoverFailedOnRestart, shouldRunRecovery, RECOVER_FAILED_ON_RESTART) + extend test_httpStatusPolicy.ts.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/httpStatusPolicy.ts", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/test_httpStatusPolicy.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsx src/tests/test_httpStatusPolicy.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["classifyFailure precedence", "isRecoverableFailureClass", "selectReclaimableIds legacy+skip", "resolveRecoverFailedOnRestart", "shouldRunRecovery"]}
```

tasks.subject: FR-T2: failedRequestHandler tag failure_class + DRY
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Handler is sole producer of failure_class; consume imported PERMANENT_ERROR_MARKERS (DRY). Push failure_class = request.noRetry ? "permanent" : classifyFailure(errorStr, status). No noRetry behavior change.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/functions.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit && npx tsx src/tests/test_functions.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DRY PERMANENT_ERROR_MARKERS", "push failure_class via noRetry rule", "no noRetry behavior change"]}
```

tasks.subject: FR-T3: filtered reclaim + reachable recovery
tasks.description:
**Goal:** reclaimFailedRequest filters via selectReclaimableIds (getData + loop + drop only if reclaimedCount>0); main.ts runs reclaim before the QUEUE HEALTH CHECK behind shouldRunRecovery(RECOVER_FAILED_ON_RESTART, typeCrawling); remove old call at 1128-1134. Add reclaim integration test (temp CRAWLEE_STORAGE_DIR) to test_functions.ts.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/functions.ts", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/test_functions.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsx src/tests/test_functions.ts && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["reclaim filter via selectReclaimableIds", "main.ts recovery before early-exit behind flag", "remove old reclaim call", "integration test passes"]}
```

tasks.description:
